events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

events.name: resource_strike
events.description: A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
